prompts.text: Analytics dashboard for e-commerce with revenue, orders, and top products
Admin dashboard for user management with table, filters, and roles
Project management dashboard with kanban board and team avatars
Healthcare clinic dashboard with appointments and patient queue
Marketing campaign dashboard with channel performance charts
DevOps status dashboard with uptime monitors and incident log
HR dashboard with hiring pipeline and offer tracking
Support ticket dashboard with SLA timers and agent workload
Inventory dashboard with low-stock alerts and supplier list
Education admin dashboard with courses, enrollments, and grades
